# Basic rectangle under the abstract-grid stamp phase.
# Serves as a baseline for P4 — exercises the simplest possible
# geometry with the flag on so we can track how the stamp path
# evolves through suppression passes.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
200,150
0,150
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 120

screenshot
----
